seo.title: Little Rock Restaurant Week — September 2026 | Metro Little Rock Events
seo.description: Little Rock Restaurant Week returns with prix-fixe menus at 40+ participating restaurants across The Heights, SoMa, downtown, and the metro.

description: Little Rock Restaurant Week is the best time to try restaurants you've been meaning to visit — dozens of participating spots across The Heights, SoMa, Midtown, downtown, and West Little Rock offer special prix-fixe menus at $20 lunch and $35–$45 dinner price points. It's the week the local food community comes out in force, and reservations at the most sought-after spots (South on Main, Kemuri, Cache, Brave New) fill up in the first day of booking. Make your reservations the week before. Weekday lunches are often the hidden value — same prix-fixe menu, no wait.

image.alt: Prix-fixe dinner during Little Rock Restaurant Week
